pdf.hero.title: PDF Splitter
pdf.hero.description: Transform each page of your PDF into four quadrants automatically. Perfect for documents that need to be split into smaller sections.
pdf.features.fast.title: Fast processing
pdf.features.fast.desc: Automatic and instant splitting of your PDFs
pdf.features.accurate.title: Accurate
pdf.features.accurate.desc: Smart algorithm detects content in each quadrant
pdf.features.safe.title: Secure & private
pdf.features.safe.desc: Files are processed locally and removed automatically
pdf.steps.1.title: Upload your PDF
pdf.steps.1.desc: Select the PDF you want to split. Large files up to 200MB are supported.
pdf.steps.2.title: Automatic processing
pdf.steps.2.desc: We analyze each page and split it automatically into four quadrants.
pdf.steps.3.title: Instant download
pdf.steps.3.desc: Download the processed PDF with all pages split at high quality.
pdfimg.form.title: Convert PDF to Images
pdfconvert.form.title: Convert PDF to DOCX or image
pdfimg.hero.title: PDF to Images
pdfimg.hero.description: Convert PDFs into optimized images for the web, presentations and reports.
pdfconvert.hero.title: Convert PDF online
pdfconvert.hero.description: Export an editable DOCX or turn each page into PNG, JPG or WEBP images.
pdfimg.features.pages.title: Images per page
pdfimg.features.pages.desc: Each page turns into a separate image — perfect for slides or social media.
pdfimg.features.quality.title: Configured quality
pdfimg.features.quality.desc: High-resolution rendering to keep text and graphics crisp.
pdfimg.features.formats.title: Flexible formats
pdfimg.features.formats.desc: Choose PNG for transparency, JPG for photos or WEBP for the best compression.
pdfconvert.features.editable.title: Editable DOCX
pdfconvert.features.editable.desc: Export the whole PDF as a Word document ready for editing.
pdfconvert.features.pages.title: Images per page
pdfconvert.features.pages.desc: Turn each page into a standalone image for slides or social media.
pdfconvert.features.formats.title: Flexible formats
pdfconvert.features.formats.desc: Pick DOCX for editing or PNG, JPG and WEBP for fast sharing.
pdfimg.result.title: Images generated!
pdfimg.result.caption: Download each converted page or process another PDF.
pdfimg.result.files.title: Available files
pdfimg.result.files.subtitle: Click to download. Files are deleted automatically after one hour.
pdfconvert.result.title: Conversion complete!
pdfconvert.result.caption: Download the generated files or convert another PDF.
pdfconvert.result.files.title: Available files
pdfconvert.result.files.subtitle: Click to download. Files are deleted automatically after one hour.
home.feature.pdfimg.title: PDF to Images
home.feature.pdfimg.desc: Turn your PDF into an editable DOCX or export pages as PNG, JPG and WEBP.
image.hero.title: Image Converter
image.hero.description: Convert your images across popular and advanced formats while keeping quality and transparency.
image.features.batch.title: Batch friendly
image.features.batch.desc: Upload several files at once and receive all conversions in seconds.
image.features.formats.title: Flexible formats
image.features.formats.desc: Pick the best format for the web, print or mobile — from JPG to AVIF.
image.features.privacy.title: Privacy preserved
image.features.privacy.desc: Files are automatically deleted after one hour.
audio.hero.title: Audio Converter
audio.hero.description: Turn audio files into any format with optimized settings and automatic cleanup.
audio.features.formats.title: Wide format support
audio.features.formats.desc: Convert between MP3, AAC, FLAC, OGG, WMA, AC3, CAF and more.
audio.features.quality.title: Quality control
audio.features.quality.desc: We preserve bitrates ideal for streaming, download or professional use.
audio.features.safe.title: Secure processing
audio.features.safe.desc: Files are deleted after processing and never shared.
video.hero.title: Video Converter
video.hero.description: Convert videos to popular formats with presets optimized for streaming and social media.
video.features.compatible.title: Works everywhere
video.features.compatible.desc: Exports ready for YouTube, Instagram, TV, mobile and more.
video.features.codecs.title: Balanced codecs
video.features.codecs.desc: H.264, VP9, HEVC and other codecs tuned for the best size/quality ratio.
video.features.safe.title: Protected data
video.features.safe.desc: Uploads and conversions are wiped automatically after one hour.
background.hero.title: Background Remover
background.hero.description: Remove the background from your images automatically while preserving details.
